subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Do everything in your power to help the poor and needy. Serve God in this way... Souls differ in their capacity to receive and manifest the Light of the Spirit.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @differences in human capacity, @war and peace, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @origin of the soul; the soul as emanation, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
